description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular, modern design with a dark wood frame and a contrasting lighter front panel. The front side displays six drawers, each equipped with small, round black knobs for easy access. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are finished in a uniform dark wood, giving the piece a cohesive and sturdy appearance. The construction suggests a combination of engineered wood and possibly solid wood for structural integrity. The overall look is minimalist, with no visible decorative embellishments or branding.
description: A modern, rectangular chest of drawers with a dark wood frame, six drawers with black knobs, and a flat top surface. The design is minimalist and functional.
description_view_0: The front view shows a light-colored panel with subtle drawer outlines, framed by dark wood, and no visible handles or knobs.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a solid, dark wood panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: The back view displays six drawers with small, round black knobs, all set in a dark wood frame.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain, dark wood panel with no visible features.
